strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript/Node.js, React, and multiple languages
Direct AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq including MCP code generators
Strong testing/TDD background with workshops, Selenium courses, and authored D testing libraries
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume or projects
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is dated (robotic arms at Altom 2016-2018)
Vitest not explicitly cited; testing experience leans on Jest-era and D-language tooling

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and current Kotlin/Java exposure

response.justification: Candidate clearly exceeds the 6+ years bar with ~15 years across full-stack roles, and current role at re:cinq directly covers TypeScript/Node.js plus AI-agent infrastructure (MCP generators), matching two high-weight competencies. React (Optilyz), MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker/Kubernetes (GISCollective), and Git are all evidenced. Testing expertise is strong via TDD practice at RIDE and authored D testing frameworks, though Vitest specifically isn't cited. Gaps: Nest.js is absent from the resume, and Kotlin is not listed at all — Java appears only in 2016-2018 robotics work. These are learnable for a senior with this breadth, but represent a real mismatch against the stated primary/secondary stack.
